parsedJson.summary: The site looks like a real roofing company, but the above-fold design feels heavy, crowded, and short on trust proof for a Brisbane customer ready to call.

issues.title: Quote button is visually too quiet
issues.what_observed: The hero CTA is a thin red outline button reading "GET A QUOTE" on a pale grey background, placed below the large headline.
issues.why_problem: A local customer comparing roofers may not immediately notice the quote action, especially because the phone number and navigation compete for attention at the top of the page.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A solid high-contrast red button above the fold, paired with a secondary phone action, both large enough to scan quickly.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the outlined hero button with a solid red "Get a Free Quote" button and add a nearby phone CTA such as "Call 1300 127 663" in a secondary style.
issues.plain_explanation: 首页最重要的“获取报价”按钮太轻，看起来不像主要按钮，容易被忽略。
issues.customer_impact: 很多本地客户只会快速扫一眼页面，通常几秒内决定要不要联系。按钮不明显，会让已经有需求的客户少一步行动，直接减少电话和报价询盘。

issues.title: No proof before asking for action
issues.what_observed: The visible hero area shows a roof photo, headline, navigation, phone number, and service tiles, but no reviews, years in business, licence, warranty, or local proof.
issues.why_problem: Roof replacement is expensive and high-risk; a Brisbane search visitor needs quick reassurance that the company is established and trusted before calling.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A compact trust row directly under the headline or CTA with items like star rating, years of experience, licensed and insured, and Brisbane service coverage.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Add a trust strip in the hero area with Google rating, review count if available, licence or insurance statement, and a short Brisbane-local claim.
issues.plain_explanation: 首页第一屏没有马上告诉客户“我们靠谱”，比如评价、资质、经验年限或保修。
issues.customer_impact: 换屋顶是高价决定，客户会更谨慎。缺少信任信息时，他们更可能返回 Google 去看下一家公司，特别是从 GBP 点进来的陌生客户。

issues.title: Navigation feels crowded
issues.what_observed: The header contains a dark top bar, logo area, multiple large menu blocks, a highlighted red "SERVICE AREAS" tab, and a separate phone number area.
issues.why_problem: A customer who just wants a roofer may have to work too hard to decide where to click, and the quote action is mixed into a busy row of competing options.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A simpler header with logo, phone number, one strong quote button, and 4-5 clear menu items.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Collapse secondary links like About Us, Careers, and Blog out of the primary header; keep Services, Projects, Service Areas, phone, and quote CTA prominent.
issues.plain_explanation: 顶部菜单内容太多，客户第一眼不知道最该点哪里。
issues.customer_impact: 本地搜索客户通常目标很直接：看是否可信，然后打电话或询价。选择太多会拖慢决定，增加离开的机会。

issues.title: Headline is hard to read at a glance
issues.what_observed: The hero headline breaks across multiple heavy all-caps lines: "METAL ROOFING BRISBANE - ROOF REPLACEMENT & RE ROOFING".
issues.why_problem: The message is relevant, but the stacked all-caps layout makes it feel loud and less natural, so visitors may not absorb the offer quickly.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A shorter headline with natural phrasing, supported by one sentence explaining the service and location.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Rewrite the hero as "Metal Roof Replacement in Brisbane" with a smaller supporting line for re-roofing, repairs, and residential or commercial coverage.
issues.plain_explanation: 标题内容是对的，但全大写又分成很多行，读起来比较费劲。
issues.customer_impact: 客户看页面时不会逐字阅读。标题越难扫读，越容易错过你正好提供他们需要的服务。

issues.title: Service tiles pull attention down
issues.what_observed: A wide row of service tiles overlaps the bottom of the hero area, with one large red tile and several icon-based categories.
issues.why_problem: The services are useful, but the heavy red tile competes with the main quote action and makes the first screen feel visually busy.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A quieter service selector below the primary hero action, with equal-weight tiles and the quote path still visually dominant.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Move service cards below the hero CTA area or reduce their visual weight so the primary phone and quote actions remain the strongest elements.
issues.plain_explanation: 服务分类块太抢眼，和“获取报价”按钮抢注意力。
issues.customer_impact: 如果客户注意力被分类块分散，就可能开始浏览而不是马上联系。对从 Google 过来的高意向客户来说，联系路径应该最明显。

positive_observations: The large roof photo clearly shows the type of work being offered.
The phone number is visible in the top-right area on desktop.
The red brand color creates clear recognition across the header and service sections.
redesign_priorities: 1. Make phone and quote actions the strongest elements above the fold.
2. Add visible trust proof near the hero headline before asking visitors to act.
3. Simplify the header and rewrite the hero message for faster scanning.
